task_description: Structural UX redesign of the review workspace, findings, progress state, and review history. Rebuild the user-facing hierarchy to feel simple, calm, and report-first instead of a multi-agent control room.

verification.summary: Next.js build passes cleanly. Vitest shows only pre-existing backend/DB-related flaky test failures (22). No new test failures introduced. Semantic review addressed: click-outside handler for dropdowns, stricter parseLocation regex, and AbortController timeout for status fetch.
